leadText: Justified (Japanese: せいぎのこころ Heart of Justice) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Justified is hit by a Dark-type damaging move, its Attack is increased by one stage. This Ability does not provide immunity or reduction to the damage, nor does it activate from a Dark-type move hitting its Substitute . Dark-type multistrike moves (such as Beat Up ) will activate Justified once per strike, increasing the Attack stat that many stages. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Justified has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Conq. Raises Attack if hit by a Dark-type move. MD GtI The Pokémon's attack goes up each time it's hit by a Dark-type move. * Each time the Pokémon is hit by a Dark-type move, its Attack goes up! * S MD Each time the Pokémon is hit by a Dark-type move, its Attack goes up!
